Description

Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.

    Field
    Description
    static final BasicBeanStore

    Static reusable empty instance.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return BasicBeanStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.addBean(Class<T> beanType, T bean)
    Adds an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.addBean(Class<T> beanType, T bean, String name)
    Adds a named bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.addDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Adds a fallback supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.addDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier, String name)
    Adds a fallback supplier for a named bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.addSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> bean)
    Adds a supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.addSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> bean, String name)
    Adds a supplier for a named bean of the specified type to this store.
    BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.clear()
    Removes all beans from this store.
    BasicBeanStore
    BasicBeanStore.promoteDefaultsToLocalSuppliers()
    Promotes every locally-registered default supplier to a local entry supplier of the same name and type.
